choose a throne:

Event: The Hunting Adventure
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR211


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Winged Defender Outfit

Once in a while, the unit casts a plasma shield on themself that absorbs 320000 damage of any type for 5 sec. When an enemy deals damage to the shield, that enemy takes 64000 pure damage. The ability triggers up to once per 1 sec. When the shield wears off, it explodes and the armor wearer begins to incinerate 2 enemies with the most health for 5 sec. The incinerated enemies take 48000 pure damage every second for 5 sec. and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated target take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the targets of the ability are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
